productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Solid Black Handbag
description: Update your style quotient with ease by adding this stylish bag from lino perros. Roomy and comfortable to carry, the smooth silhouette of this bag blends well with any outfit. Height: 26 cmWidth: 36 cmDepth: 10 cm Made of Leatherette with a lock and key design with a key pouch on the front for added security Has a removable flap to carry bag without the lock attached with magnetic buttons Has one zippered compartment with two inner zippers and organiser sleeves for a mobile and essentials Two short handles with woven design for carrying ease and style Braided design in the front and back Stitch design on the sides for additional style Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
